title: Rise of Magic: Chapter IV
description: Immerse yourself in a magical medieval RPG world of mysteries and battles
body:
![The end](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cce360af488ca67ef455067988c02011a52bd22e.webp)
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36dcbd15e5a59fb680150968eb66339e279c95c2.png)

- **Over 100 New Biomes** 🏞️   

- **New Weapons with Unique Skills** ⚔️  

- **Challenging and Intriguing Bosses** 👹  

- **Exciting New Dimensions** 🌌  

- **Enhanced Vanilla Structures** 🏰  

- **Improved Combat System and Mob Animations** 🛡️  

- **Integration of Many Major Magic Mods** ✨  

- **Character Leveling System to Effectively Confront New Dangers** 📈
